channel.title: Homepage on Jakub Kaczor
channel.description: Recent content in Homepage on Jakub Kaczor

item.title: Contact
item.description: The list In case you need to quickly contact me, here is the list of the ways you can do this ordered by my preference descending. You will find rationale behind this order below. 📧 E‐mail: jakub@jakubkaczor.com Signal CALL Cell phone call Signal message SMS Rationale I would like to stress that I assume discussed forms of communication are used in the most common manner. You could use e‐mail for IM—although not that instant—but the way these services are constructed inclines you to specified use.
